title: gochnatia oligantha
intro: Gochnatia oligantha, also known as the "small-flowered Gochnatia," is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Gochnatia oligantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Gochnatia oligantha can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments.
